title: Every checklist-* criterion in this Core Features dimension passes during the agent verifier run
No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session
Palettes list is static HTML only with no working create/edit/delete against shared state
App chrome navigates via real outbound links to other origins instead of in-app view state
Qwik stores holds palettes, view mode, period filter, and selection — shared across components
Implemented with Qwik, Qwik stores, and Tailwind CSS; no browser storage APIs for persistence
Uses localStorage or sessionStorage to persist palettes or filters
Manages the palettes collection only in component-local signals only rather than Qwik stores
Editorial cream library composition with distinct browse layouts remains non-dashboard
Empty library state is visually present when the collection or filter result is empty
Replaces the library with a static brochure and no interactive palette collection
Required hover animations are present on swatches and chrome; view switches stay snappy
Browse/Detail mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback
Omits hover feedback on swatches or cards so the library feels static on pointer hover
